project1.title: PROJECT TRAVIA
project1.description: A Star Wars themed project made for the reservation of spaceships for certain flights.
project1.detailedDescription: This project was to be carried out in a team of 4 and consisted of creating a website for booking flights for spaceships on the theme of Star Wars. We first had to create objects in PHP and a database to store the information of flights and reservations. Then, we had to implement an interactive Leaflet map to display the route of the chosen flight, calculating the total distance and its cost.
project1.demoText: Simulation / demonstration area of the project

project2.title: PROJECT SPEEDYWIKI
project2.description: A game where you have to visit 5 randomly chosen Wikipedia articles as fast as possible.
project2.detailedDescription: This project was to be carried out in a team of 4 and consisted of creating a web application on which users could create lobbies to play in multiplayer and race to reach the 5 randomly chosen Wikipedia articles. The technical complexity of this work was quite advanced: we had to set up a Websocket server to manage the different actions of the players in real time, use the Wikipedia API to retrieve the chosen articles and edit their content to adapt it to the game, and finally ensure that the application was supported on mobile. A Python solver was also created to find the shortest possible path between two articles.
project2.demoText: Simulation / demonstration area of the project

project3.title: PROJECT PLURI'ELLES
project3.description: A platform made to simplify the process of recruiting candidates using AI and other complex technologies.
project3.detailedDescription: This project was to be carried out in a team of 6 and is the most complex of the 3 presented on this Portfolio. Two web platforms had to be created: the first being an ATS (Applicant Tracking System) dedicated to simplifying the recruitment process for the company Pluri'Elles (text extraction from a CV by OCR, first spelling and grammar check, second content analysis, scoring according to the offer and profile summary made by AI), and the second being an E-Learning platform to train the company's employees (interactive quiz systems, VR module for certain training courses).
project3.demoText: Simulation / demonstration area of the project
